nasb.text: “You shall bring the very first of the first fruits of your soil into the house of the Lord your God. “You shall not boil a young goat in its mother’s milk.”

esv.text: The best of the firstfruits of your ground you shall bring to the house of the Lord your God. You shall not boil a young goat in its mother’s milk.”

cnv.text: 你要把你地裡最早生產的初熟之物送到耶和華你的　神的殿裡。不可用羊羔母的奶去煮羊羔。”

ccb.text: “要把田中最好的初熟之物送到你们的上帝耶和华的殿中。 “不可用母山羊的奶煮它的小羊羔。”
